data.current_description: Get all scheduling resources (events, webinars, services)
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all scheduling resources configured in the system, including events, webinars, and services. Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters. Returns a list of Resource objects containing resource details such as name, type, availability settings, and configuration.

Added specifics about ResourceRequest schema usage, what fields are expected, return value details (including generated ID), and side effect (resource becomes available for booking) to enable AI agents to understand the complete operation lifecycle.

data.current_description: Create a new scheduling resource with configuration
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new scheduling resource (event, webinar, or service) with the provided configuration. Accepts a ResourceRequest object containing resource details such as name, type, and availability settings. Returns the created Resource object with a generated resource ID. The new resource becomes immediately available for booking.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about inputs and outputs. data.current_description: Get available booking time slots for a specific date and resource
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves available time slots for a specified resource on a given date. Requires resource ID and date as query parameters. Returns a list of TimeSlot objects representing open booking windows. Each TimeSlot includes start time, end time, and availability status. Useful for displaying booking options to end users.
data.reasoning: Description mentions 2 parameters but doesn't name them or explain their format. Missing details about response structure (TimeSlot objects). data.current_description: Create a new appointment or update an existing one
data.summary_suggestion: Create new booking or update existing appointment
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new booking or updates an existing appointment depending on whether a booking ID is provided in the BookingRequest. Accepts a BookingRequest object containing resource ID, time slot, and attendee details. Returns the created or updated Booking object with confirmation details. If creating a new booking, a booking ID is generated and the time slot is reserved. If updating, only provided fields are modified and availability is recalculated if time changes.
data.reasoning: Summary is ambiguous about the dual functionality. Description lacks clarity on how the operation determines create vs. update behavior. Missing details about BookingRequest structure, return value, and side effects (reservation, availability recalculation). Enhanced to explain the conditional logic, input/output schemas, and state changes to enable AI agents to use this operation correctly.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels an existing booking (appointment) by booking ID. Requires the booking ID as a path parameter. Returns a confirmation response indicating successful cancellation. Canceling a booking releases the reserved time slot back to availability, making it available for other bookings. The original booking record is retained for audit purposes but marked as cancelled.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Missing details about the required parameter (booking ID), response format, and important side effects (time slot release, audit trail).
